title: Failed to parse Verilog code with escaped identifiers

features.name: escaped identifier with array index in port declaration
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier with an array index suffix used as a module port, where a wire array with the same base name exists

features.name: escaped identifier array access in concatenation
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier with array index used within a concatenation expression alongside regular array accesses
features.snippet:
wire a[1:0];
assign o = {\a[1] , a[0], a[1]};
